steps.t: Rhiangar has asked you to bring wine to her father, the mayor, and to see if you can learn anything of import. The wine is in the kitchen of the mayor…
Rhiangar has asked you to bring wine to her father, the mayor, and to see if you can learn anything of import. The mayor is at the dining table, in th…
You should let Rhiangar know what you learned from Osian and the Mayor. Rhiangar is in the kitchen in the mayor's house in Herne.
Rhiangar has asked you to bring her mother's journal to her from the library. The library is in the mayor's house in Herne.
You should bring the journal to Rhiangar. Rhiangar is in the kitchen of the mayor's house, in Herne.
While the stew stews, Rhiangar has asked you to meet her at Herne's inn, The Crossway House.
